description_long: This chair features a rounded, semi-enclosed backrest with a distinctive branch-like openwork pattern, giving it a modern and artistic appearance. The seat is wide and circular, upholstered in a vibrant red material that contrasts with the dark wood frame. The armrests curve smoothly from the backrest, integrating seamlessly into the overall design and providing comfortable support. The legs are slender and slightly curved, echoing the organic motif of the backrest and armrests. The rear of the chair is partially enclosed with a solid panel, adding structural stability and visual interest. This chair would stand out in urban parks, stylish outdoor cafes, or contemporary public spaces.
description: A modern chair with a circular red seat, dark wood frame, and branch-patterned backrest and armrests, blending artistic design with comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide red seat, curved armrests, and intricate branch-patterned backrest.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the openwork armrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the curvature of the backrest and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the organic armrest design and seat width.
